data.title: GSK’s Nucala Gains Approval in China for CRSwNP
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

GlaxoSmithKline ( (GSK) ) has provided an update.

GSK announced that its monoclonal antibody, Nucala (mepolizumab), has been approved in China for treating adults with chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps (CRSwNP), a condition affecting 30 million people in the country. This approval marks the third indication for mepolizumab in China and offers patients a non-surgical treatment alternative to systemic corticosteroids and surgery. The approval is based on successful trials demonstrating its efficacy and safety, positioning GSK as a leader in addressing type 2 inflammation-related diseases.

More about GlaxoSmithKline

GSK is a global biopharmaceutical company dedicated to combining science, technology, and talent to advance healthcare. It has a leading respiratory portfolio and is committed to improving treatments and outcomes for people with respiratory diseases such as asthma, COPD, chronic cough, and rarer conditions, aiming to modify and prevent disease progression.

YTD Price Performance: 0.0%

Average Trading Volume: 5,830,724

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: $68.81B

See more data about GSK stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: NOVA Group’s New Ventures Amid Economic Challenges
data.description:
NOVA Group Holdings Ltd. (HK:1360) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

NOVA Group Holdings Ltd. is navigating challenging economic conditions in the PRC, which have impacted its cultural and entertainment services and loan business. Despite the difficulties, the company has launched new clubbing operations and wine distribution in Hong Kong, contributing HK$4.6 million in revenue and offering potential growth opportunities. The company remains operational, although the trading of its shares is currently suspended due to financial uncertainties.

Cult Food Science Corp.’s subsidiary, Further Foods, has announced that their Noochies! products can now be purchased using popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana, and Dogecoin. data.title: Xunlei Appoints JPMorgan as New ADR Depositary
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Xunlei ( (XNET) ) has provided an announcement.

Xunlei Limited has announced a change in its American Depositary Receipt (ADR) program by appointing JPMorgan Chase Bank as the new depositary, effective December 31, 2024. This strategic move aims to enhance Xunlei’s financial operations and potentially strengthen its market presence, with no required actions from ADR holders.

More about Xunlei

Founded in 2003, Xunlei Limited is a leading technology company in China specializing in distributed cloud services. The company offers a diverse range of products and services, focusing on cloud acceleration, shared cloud computing, and digital entertainment to enhance internet experiences.

data.title: Rex International Adjusts Quoted Investment Portfolio
data.description:
Rex International Holding Ltd. (SG:5WH) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Rex International Holding Ltd. has announced a decrease in the cost of its quoted investments from US$15.019 million to US$13.019 million, attributed to the maturity of certain debt investments by the end of 2024. This adjustment reflects a change in the percentage of their net tangible assets from 15.81% to 13.70%. Investors might find this shift significant as it impacts the company’s investment strategy and financial positioning.

data.title: Ryanair Reports 8% Traffic Growth in December 2024
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

An update from Ryanair Holdings ( (RYAAY) ) is now available.

Ryanair Holdings plc reported an 8% increase in December 2024 traffic, with 13.6 million guests compared to 12.5 million in December 2023. The airline operated over 77,380 flights during the month, maintaining a load factor of 92%. This growth in passenger traffic highlights Ryanair’s robust operational performance and its continued appeal in the competitive low-cost airline market.

More about Ryanair Holdings

Ryanair Holdings plc is a prominent low-cost airline operating primarily in Europe. The company is known for offering budget-friendly air travel options and has positioned itself as a leader in the no-frills airline industry.

data.title: Land Securities Updates Share Capital and Voting Rights
data.description:
Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

Land Securities Group plc REIT ( (GB:LAND) ) has shared an announcement.

Land Securities Group PLC announced that its issued ordinary share capital consisted of 751,727,140 shares as of December 31, 2024, with 6,789,236 shares held in Treasury, for which voting rights and dividend entitlements are waived. Consequently, the total number of voting rights stands at 744,937,904. This figure is significant for stakeholders and shareholders as it serves as the denominator for determining the necessity to notify changes in their interest under the company’s disclosure rules.

More about Land Securities Group plc REIT

Land Securities Group PLC is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on owning, developing, and managing commercial properties across the United Kingdom. As a leading player in the property industry, the company engages in activities that include retail, leisure, and office spaces, aiming to create value for its stakeholders through strategic asset management and development projects.

data.title: TYK Medicines Approves Key Resolutions at EGM
data.description:
TYK Medicines, Inc. Class H (HK:2410) has released an update.

Don't Miss Our New Year's Offers:

  • Discover the latest stocks recommended by top Wall Street analysts, all in one place with Analyst Top Stocks
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

TYK Medicines, Inc. recently held its first extraordinary general meeting of 2025, where shareholders approved several key resolutions, including adjustments to director remuneration and the establishment of a wholly-owned subsidiary in Hong Kong. The meeting, chaired by Dr. Wu Yusheng, also greenlit the purchase of fixed assets and the creation of a subsidiary focused on macromolecular drug R&D. Notably, all resolutions received overwhelming support, reflecting strong investor confidence in the company’s strategic direction.
